title: Feature: OpenAPI Spec Input via REST API and File Drop

done: src/adapters/primary/web-adapter.ts — existing web adapter with /api/guide and /api/diff

steps.description: Add ResolvedSpec type and OpenAPI format union to domain types. ResolvedSpec has format, document, and metadata fields. No external imports.
steps.done_condition: types.ts compiles with ResolvedSpec exported, hex analyze passes

steps.description: Add SpecInputPort interface to ports/index.ts with fromUrl(url: string) and fromFile(content: string, filename: string) methods, both returning Promise<ResolvedSpec>.
steps.done_condition: ports/index.ts compiles with SpecInputPort exported, hex analyze passes

steps.description: Implement SpecInputAdapter as a secondary adapter. fromUrl: HTTP GET, detect JSON/YAML, parse, detect OpenAPI version (swagger:'2.0' or openapi:'3.x'), resolve $ref via @apidevtools/json-schema-ref-parser, validate well-formedness (unique keys, bounded depth), extract title/version metadata. fromFile: detect format from extension (.yaml/.yml → YAML, else JSON), parse, same validation pipeline. Reject non-OpenAPI, empty files, malformed YAML with descriptive errors.
steps.done_condition: Unit tests pass for: JSON URL fetch, YAML file parse, OpenAPI 2.0 detection, OpenAPI 3.0 detection, invalid URL error, malformed YAML error, $ref resolution, non-OpenAPI rejection, empty file rejection

steps.description: Update WebAdapter: (1) Add POST /api/fetch-spec endpoint that accepts {url, side} body, calls SpecInputPort.fromUrl(), returns ResolvedSpec JSON. (2) Add file drop handler constructor parameter (SpecInputPort). (3) Update static/index.html: add URL input field + Fetch button next to each textarea, add drop zone overlay on each textarea with dragover/drop handlers using File API, populate textarea via textContent/value (never innerHTML per ADR-004). Drop zone calls POST /api/fetch-file with file content.
steps.done_condition: Web adapter compiles with new endpoints. HTML has drop zones and URL inputs. No innerHTML/outerHTML/insertAdjacentHTML used with external data. hex analyze passes.

steps.description: Wire SpecInputAdapter into composition root. Update createWebApp() to instantiate SpecInputAdapter and pass it to WebAdapter constructor. Update createCliApp() to use SpecInputAdapter for spec loading.
steps.done_condition: Full app builds and starts. composition-root.ts is the only file importing adapters. hex analyze passes.

steps.description: Integration tests: (1) Fetch a real OpenAPI spec URL (e.g. Petstore), verify ResolvedSpec has correct format and metadata. (2) Parse a YAML spec file, verify identical output to JSON equivalent. (3) End-to-end: two specs in → diff results out → guide generated with correct changes. (4) Verify error cases: 404 URL, malformed YAML, non-OpenAPI JSON, empty file.
steps.done_condition: All integration tests pass. bun test --filter spec-input exits 0.

npm.name: yaml
npm.purpose: Parse YAML OpenAPI specs to JSON

mergeOrder: step-1 → step-2 (domain types then port interface)
step-5 after step-3 + step-4 (wiring needs both adapters)

riskRegister.risk: $ref resolver pulls external URLs during file-drop parsing
riskRegister.mitigation: Disable external $ref resolution for fromFile — only resolve internal refs. Document limitation.

riskRegister.risk: CORS blocks server-side spec fetch for certain hosts
riskRegister.mitigation: Server-side fetch bypasses CORS. Add timeout (10s) and size limit (10MB) to prevent abuse.

riskRegister.risk: Large OpenAPI specs (>5MB) cause performance issues in flatten/diff
riskRegister.mitigation: Add size validation in SpecInputAdapter. Warn user if spec exceeds 5MB before diffing.

successCriteria: User can paste a URL, click Fetch, and see the resolved OpenAPI spec in the textarea
User can drag-drop a .yaml or .json file onto the textarea and see the parsed content
Diff and migration guide work correctly with fetched/dropped OpenAPI specs
Invalid inputs produce clear error messages without crashing
hex analyze reports zero architecture violations
